nodes.label:
Preprocess Plaintext
(Add X for doubles, make even)

Same Row?
Replace with right neighbor

Same Column?
Replace with bottom neighbor

Different Row/Col?
Form rectangle, take opposite corners

visuals.title: Playfair Encryption Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Playfair, Hill, and Polyalphabetic Ciphers</text>
  
  <!-- Playfair Cipher -->
  <rect x="30" y="50" width="110" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Playfair Cipher
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="40" y="100" width="90" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    5x5 Grid
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Hill Cipher -->
  <rect x="155" y="50" width="110" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Hill Cipher
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="165" y="100" width="90" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Matrix Math
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Polyalphabetic Cipher -->
  <rect x="280" y="50" width="110" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Polyalphabetic
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="290" y="100" width="90" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Multiple Alphabets
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting Elements -->
  <line x1="140" y1="80" x2="155" y2="80" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="265" y1="80" x2="280" y2="80" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Examples -->
  <rect x="30" y="160" width="360" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Examples: Vigenère, Beaufort, Autokey
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Key Concept -->
  <rect x="30" y="220" width="360" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Common Principle: Multiple Substitution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    (Defeat frequency analysis)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
